TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Art_Becker, title = Art_Becker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Art_Becker} }

S.FORM: Art Becker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 1, Art Becker, biru na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Art Becker mqwas biru sa Camelback pqwsan biru seneng sa Phoenix, Arizona. Art Becker t'aring kawas tay 1961 tehuk kawas tay 1964, mqwas biru sa Arizona State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 2005 kawas

Art Becker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 1, Art Becker, biru na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Art Becker mqwas biru sa Camelback pqwsan biru seneng sa Phoenix, Arizona. Art Becker t'aring kawas tay 1961 tehuk kawas tay 1964, mqwas biru sa Arizona State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 2005 kawas
